content.full_text:
November 19, 2004

The Honorable Rodney E. DeBoer
City of Susanville
66 North Lassen Street
Susanville, CA 96130-3904

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-206

Dear Mayor DeBoer:

Pursuant to the November 18, 2004, telephone message from City Administrator Luann Rainey, your request on behalf of the City of Susanville Airport Commission for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ is hereby withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-206

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
